task_completion.description: Open the FITS image of globular cluster NGC 6652.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image processing application (e.g., ImageJ/Fiji) is open, displaying the image 'ngc6652_555wmos.fits'.

task_completion.description: Select exactly 8 circular ROIs centered on stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image or ROI Manager shows exactly 8 circular selections (Regions of Interest) placed over visible stars in the image.

task_completion.description: Ensure ROIs are isolated (at least 100 pixels apart) and appropriately sized (10-pixel diameter).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 8 ROIs are visibly spread out across the image (not clustered tightly together) and are small circles (radius 5 pixels).

task_completion.description: Configure measurements to include Area, Mean gray value, and Centroid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Set Measurements' dialog shows checkboxes ticked for 'Area', 'Mean gray value', and 'Centroid', or a Results table displays these specific columns for the 8 ROIs.

task_completion.description: Export the measurement file for the 8 targets to mos_targets.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the creation of 'mos_targets.csv' in the '~/AstroImages/mos_planning/' directory, or the Results window being saved to this path.

task_completion.description: Export the set of 8 ROIs to mos_targets.zip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ROI Manager's save dialog or a file manager shows the creation of 'mos_targets.zip' in the '~/AstroImages/mos_planning/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical image analysis tool to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with an actual GUI application (like ImageJ/Fiji) to view the FITS file and select ROIs, rather than just running a pre-written script in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actively selected the stars on the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ROIs are visibly drawn on the image or populated in an ROI manager tool, rather than being manually typed into a text file.

integrity.description: The CSV and ZIP files were exported using the application's built-in save functions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs from the image processing application are visible, confirming the files were generated by the software and not spoofed using a text editor or basic terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 8 target stars to be selected. The minimum pairwise distance between selected targets must be at least 100 pixels. The ROIs must be circular with a radius of 5 (diameter 10), which yields an area between 70.0 and 85.0 (ideal is ~78.5). The exported measurements must include Area, Mean gray value, and Centroid.
